calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Oct-08-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Courtcall:
Andrew Zacks, Esq., 415-956-8100, appearing for San Francisco Apartment, Plaintiff
Tara Steeley, Esq., 510-209-9722, appearing for City and County of San Francisco, for Defendant.
Court reporter:Raquel Sharp. CSR #10619. Telephone (925)384-0003. Email: raquel@transcriptlegal.com

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). The Court addressed the issue of standing. Mr. Zacks stated that is it the burden of the petitioner to establish standing. Ms. Steeley presented her oral argument. Mr. Zacks argued his postion regarding the procedural requirements for settlement.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER SAN FRANCISCO APARTMENT ASSOCIATION, SAN FRANCISCO ASSOCIATION OF REALTORS, COALITION FOR BETTER HOUSING, SMALL PROPERTY OWNERS OF SAN FRANCISCO INSTITUTE Notice Of Motion And Motion For Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate is taken under submission.
Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Reporter: Raquel Sharp. CSR #10619. Telephone (925)384-0003. Email: raquel@transcriptlegal.com (D501)
